subject: Isidro Pérez
summary: 75-year-old Cuban who lived in U.S. 59 years (since age 16) died Jun 26, 2025 at Florida hospital, 21 days in ICE custody. Arrested based on 40-year-old marijuana convictions (1981, 1984). Had weak heart, multiple previous heart attacks. Day 12: hospitalized with UNSTABLE ANGINA (8 days at Larkin Hospital). Jun 25: discharged back to Krome. Family reports: sleeping on FLOOR in overcrowded facility. Jun 26 (~7 PM, <24 hrs after discharge): chest pain recurs. 8:42 PM: DEAD at HCA Kendall Hospital. Cause: 'undetermined' 7+ months later. 13th ICE death 2025, 5th in Florida (HALF of all 2025 deaths), 2nd at Krome. ENTIRELY PREVENTABLE.

key_findings.facility: Krome Service Processing Center, Miami → HCA Kendall Hospital
critical_failures: 75-year-old cardiac patient arrested for 40-year-old marijuana conviction
Day 12: Hospitalized with unstable angina (life-threatening, 8 days treatment)
Jun 25: Discharged to overcrowded detention (sleeping on floor)
Jun 26: Chest pain recurs <24 hours after discharge
Jun 26: Dead 25 hours after hospital discharge
Overcrowded facility (floor sleeping) for cardiac patient
key_findings.pattern: Elderly cardiac patient, hospitalized for unstable angina, discharged to inadequate detention conditions, death within 24 hours
key_findings.detention_conditions: Family reports: Sleeping on floor in severely overcrowded facility without enough beds at Krome
key_findings.death_circumstances: Reported chest pain ~7 PM (Day 21, <24 hrs post-hospital). Miami-Dade Rescue: AED, CPR, responded to revival. Transported to Kendall Hospital. Pronounced dead 8:42 PM.
key_findings.family_advocacy: Stepdaughter Alba Patricia Gomez: 'He was like a bird that didn't want to be caged up. I don't understand what's really going on, we're all human. Why are they picking up 75-year-old people?' Maria Alaniz: 'I am no one to judge, but it really hurts me, what is happening.'
key_findings.investigation_status: Cause of death 'undetermined' 7+ months after death. DHS OIG and ICE OPR investigating. Medical Examiner report not released.
key_findings.criminal_history: Feb 10, 1981 and Jan 25, 1984: Marijuana possession convictions (1,500 lbs bust). Served 18 months prison. 40+ years ago. Lived lawfully 1984-2025.
key_findings.florida_crisis: 5th death in Florida ICE custody in 2025. Half of all 2025 ICE custody deaths nationwide occurred in Florida.
